name: @pyreon/native-runtime-kotlin
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — Kotlin runtime that compiler-emitted Compose code links against on Android. Parallel to @pyreon/native-runtime-swift. Phase 0+ scaffold; first real module is PyreonStorage (Compose + DataStore-backed persistent state).

scripts.build: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping build (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping test (Android stack required)'; fi
scripts.lint: echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] Kotlin lint (detekt/ktlint) not yet integrated; skipping lint'
scripts.typecheck: if [ "$CI" = "true" ]; then echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] skipping typecheck in CI — kotlinc cold-start + parallel-load timeouts; covered by @pyreon/native-compiler K-FINAL gate (#888) which validates the same K4 stub surface end-to-end'; elif command -v kotlinc >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun scripts/verify-kotlin.ts --typecheck-only; else echo '[native-runtime-kotlin] kotlinc not on PATH; skipping typecheck'; fi
